articles.title: NEW HONDA EV LOGO IS A MINIMALIST THROWBACK
articles.summary: Honda has unveiled a new H logo for electrified Hondas. It’s frameless, and the sides of the H are less upright, making it look like two outstretched hands. It’s also a throwback design inspired by the one used in the ‘60s.

articles.title: WHATSAPP IS ROLLING OUT AN IN-APP TOOL FOR MAKING CUSTOM STICKERS
articles.summary: WhatsApp has introduced a new feature for iOS that allows users to create, edit, and share custom stickers directly within the app. Users can personalize stickers using various editing tools and even overlay other stickers.

articles.title: COLUMBIA PICTURES' 100TH ANNIVERSARY LOGO IS AN INSTANT CLASSIC
articles.summary: Sony revealed the logo for Columbia Pictures' 100th anniversary through an animated short that traces the logo's evolution. The iconic "Lady with the Torch" symbolizes the studio's enduring legacy. The new logo incorporates modern elements while paying tribute to the studio's rich history.

articles.title: BEYOND DESIGN SYSTEMS FOR INTERFACES: AN ECOSYSTEM OF DESIGN SYSTEMS
articles.summary: There needs to be more than just a design system for interfaces to create cohesive and harmonious experiences for a brand with a portfolio of services. What organizations need is an ecosystem of design systems, starting with outlining the design approach of the organization and defining design systems for brands, services, products, and interfaces.

articles.title: JOHN MAEDA TALKS ART, GENERATIVE AI, AND CREATIVITY
articles.summary: Hear from John Maeda, Microsoft's VP of Artificial Intelligence and Design, about thriving in the AI-powered design era. During the talk, Maeda discusses how AI uniquely ties together both modes of intelligence, how these paradigms will impact the job market, and how to stay relevant as a creative in an increasingly disruptive world.

articles.title: THE TRUTH ABOUT UX BOOTCAMPS: A DESIGNER FACTORY THAT SELLS DREAMS LIKE EXPENSIVE CANDY
articles.summary: UX Bootcamps need to adequately prepare students for the job market. This is resulting in a saturation of junior designers, making it challenging to find positions. In this article, a graduate of a UX/UI Design Bootcamp shares their honest experiences and insights with the bootcamp.

articles.title: A BEAUTIFUL LIBRARY WITH SVG LOGOS
articles.summary: This collection of 300+ logos allows you to quickly copy or download SVGs of well-known brands worldwide.

articles.title: AN ALPINE & TAILWIND UI LIBRARY
articles.summary: Pines is a set of UI elements that can be copied and pasted into any Alpine or Tailwind project.

articles.title: CREATE CONSISTENT TYPOGRAPHY STYLING AND SPACING
articles.summary: Archetype provides an interactive space for typography styling, pairing, and spacing in the browser, with the option to export the results as CSS code.

articles.title: INSIDE VISIONOS: 18 THINGS DEVELOPERS NEED TO KNOW ABOUT CODING FOR APPLE VISION PRO
articles.summary: Apple’s Vision Pro introduces a “shared space” where app windows float side by side. Users can open one or more windows as planes in the space. Beyond windows, apps can create three-dimensional volumes like objects and scenes and can be moved around in 3D space.

articles.title: BLUR RADIUS COMPARISON
articles.summary: There are many ways to describe how blurry a blur is. Implementations vary so much that a blur in one app may be a completely different size from the same blur in another app. This article presents a detailed look into blurs in popular design apps like Photoshop, Figma, and Illustrator.

articles.title: EXPLORING CYFR'S BRANDING AND VISUAL IDENTITY FOR BUSINESS GROWTH
articles.summary: Cyfr's branding reflects a narrative of upward mobility and perpetual progress. The symbol used in its branding, which portrays a continuous ascent, is complemented by elements representing the synergy between the agency and its partners.

articles.title: WHAT SHOULD WE SHIP?
articles.summary: Vercel redesigned its website with a Swiss-design-inspired grid layout, a Grotesque sans-serif font as the primary typeface, and pixelated iconography.

articles.title: EXPERIMENTAL ON-SCROLL TEXT ANIMATIONS WITH SVG CLIP-PATH
articles.summary: Design elements with knockout “text” with an image or pattern behind it are becoming increasingly popular. This example adds an extra layer of the wow effect with a scrolling animation.

articles.title: DESIGNING BETTER TARGET SIZES
articles.summary: A detailed guide for designing better target sizes and improving the accessibility of websites and apps.
